My Story

A Passion for
Artistry & Craft

Born and raised in the cultural heart of Lahore, I grew up surrounded by the rich textile traditions of Pakistan — the hand-embroidered dupattas, the intricate zari work, the vibrant colors of festive celebrations.

After graduating with distinction, I honed my craft across Pakistan and internationally before returning home to launch my own atelier. Every piece I create is a conversation between heritage and the contemporary woman.

Zari Work Embroidery Design Fashion Illustration Pattern Cutting Fabric Sourcing Trend Forecasting Style Consultation Draping
8+Years of
Craftsmanship
What I Offer

Bespoke Services

From a single statement piece to a full bridal trousseau — every service is tailored to your vision, your timeline, and your story.

👰01

Bridal Couture

Your wedding dress is the most important garment you'll ever wear. We craft it together — from the first sketch to the final fitting.

✨02

Custom Occasion Wear

Mehndi, Eid, formal dinners — whatever the occasion, I design show-stopping outfits that make you the most memorable person in any room.

💄03

Style Consultation

In-depth style sessions help you discover and define your personal fashion identity — body type, skin tone, and personality included.

📝04

Fashion Blogging

Weekly insights on Pakistani and global fashion trends, style tips, fabric guides, and behind-the-scenes looks at the atelier.

🛍️05

Ready-to-Wear

Curated seasonal collections that balance beauty, comfort, and wearability — available for purchase directly from the atelier.

🪡06

Embroidery & Embellishment

Zardozi, thread work, mirror work, and sequin embellishments to transform any garment into a work of art.
